Class JFXViewBase

java.lang.Object
View.JFXViewBase
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
JFXAddPlayerView, JFXAttackResultView, JFXAttackView, JFXCardView, JFXMainView, JFXRiskCardView, JFXTransferView, JFXVictoryView
public abstract class JFXViewBase extends Object implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
